description: Configures Entra ID company branding for the sign-in experience including colors, text, and self-service password reset settings. Logo and background image uploads require the Azure portal or Microsoft Graph API.

risk_profile_effects.standard: No risk profile variation — branding is cosmetic, not security-sensitive.
risk_profile_effects.elevated: No risk profile variation — branding is cosmetic, not security-sensitive.
risk_profile_effects.strict: No risk profile variation — branding is cosmetic, not security-sensitive.

org_display_name.label: Organization Display Name
org_display_name.client_description: Your organization's name for the sign-in page.

primary_color.label: Primary Brand Color
primary_color.client_description: Hex color code for buttons and links on the sign-in page. Should match your corporate brand.

background_color.label: Background Color
background_color.client_description: Hex color code for the sign-in page background.

enable_self_service_password_reset.label: Enable Self-Service Password Reset
enable_self_service_password_reset.client_description: Allow users to reset their own passwords. Reduces IT helpdesk load. Requires MFA registration.

sign_in_page_text.label: Sign-In Page Text
sign_in_page_text.client_description: Custom text displayed on the sign-in page. Use for security reminders, helpdesk contact info, or legal notices.
